title: Divine Dog JJK
description: A mod that adds a divine dog from Jujutsu Kaisen to Minecraft. It can be summoned using /summon command and the mob employs three techniques to adapt and attack the player.
body:
A Minecraft Mod that adds the Shikigami Divine Dog from Jujutsu Kaisen to Minecraft!

Main Features about this mod you should know :
1. The Divine Dog becomes invisible when the player is in a dark cave with cursed energy particles radiating from it. (This is imitated using soul sand particles)
2. When the player is near the Divine Dog, it can use Shadow Warp to teleport directly to the player every 2 seconds, making an escape really hard to pull off.
3. The Divine Dog will have a projectile nullification technique, using which it can nullify any projectile in the game.
4. Once the ritual is complete and the divine dog is killed by the player, lightning will be summoned in a desperate attempt to kill the player .
This mod uses the Fabric 1.21 version
